---
title: "Lauer_etal_DNAm_tissue_model3"
author: "M. Ellesse Lauer"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#Packages
library(brms) #version 2.23.0, Bayesian GLMM fitting
library(dplyr) #version 1.1.4, for data manipulation
library(tidyr) #version 1.3.1, for data reshaping
library(tibble) #version 3.3.0, for data frame handling
library(bayesplot) #version 1.14.0, MCMC and PP check plots
library(tidybayes) #version 3.0.7, Posterior draws extraction
library(ggplot2) #version 3.5.2, visualizations
library(emmeans) #version 1.11.2-8, for posterior contrasts among tissues and CpGs

options(brms.backend = "cmdstanr") #cmdstanr version 0.8.0, Stan backend for brms package
```

```{r}
df_tissue <- read.csv("../data/Lauer_etal_DNAm_euthanasia_data.csv")
```

```{r}
df_tissue <- df_tissue |>
  mutate(
    BirdID    = factor(BirdID),
    Stage     = factor(Stage),   
    EP        = factor(EP),         
    Tissue    = factor(Tissue),     
    SiteEuth = factor(SiteEuth), 
    DNAm      = as.integer(DNAm),   
    BodyMassz = as.numeric(scale(BodyMass)), #mean = 0, SD = 1
    FinalSBc  = as.numeric(scale(FinalSB)) #mean = 0, SD = 1
  ) 
 
```

```{r}
df_tissue_centered <- df_tissue %>%
  mutate(
    Tissue    = relevel(Tissue, ref = "blood"),
    EP        = relevel(EP,     ref = "high"),
    SiteEuth = relevel(SiteEuth, ref = "CG01")
  )
```

```{r}
priors_dnam_tissue <- c(
  set_prior("normal(0, 1)", class = "b"),                # fixed effects
  set_prior("student_t(3, 0, 2.5)", class = "Intercept"),# intercept
  set_prior("student_t(3, 0, 1)", class = "sd")          # random intercept SDs
)
```

```{r}
#Effects structure:
#Random effect of BirdID -> accounts for the repeated observations per bird (3 tissues with the 5 CpG sites in the same promnoter); captures the underlying baseline methylation probability in each bird and gives the individual-level intercept heterogeneity

#Fixed Effects: Tissue, EP, Stage, BodyMassz, SiteEuth (this is needed as a fixed effect here because there is only one observation of the CpG sites at the tissue level)

#Interaction terms:
#Tissue*SiteEuth
#Tissue*EP

fit_dnam_term <- brm(
  DNAm ~ Tissue * SiteEuth + Tissue*EP + Stage + BodyMassz +
    (1 | BirdID),
  data    = df_tissue_centered,
  family  = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  prior   = priors_dnam_tissue,
  chains  = 4,
  iter    = 4000,
  warmup  = 2000,
  cores   = 4,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99),
  seed    = 717
)
```

```{r}
summary(fit_dnam_term)
conditional_effects(fit_dnam_term)

mcmc_plot(fit_dnam_term, type = "trace")

pp_check(fit_dnam_term, type = "bars")
pp_check(fit_dnam_term, type = "stat", stat = "mean")
pp_check(fit_dnam_term, type = "stat_grouped", group = "SiteEuth")
pp_check(fit_dnam_term, type = "stat_grouped", group = "Tissue")

```

```{r}
# Ensure factor order matches
df_tissue_centered <- df_tissue_centered %>%
  mutate(
    Tissue  = factor(Tissue, levels = c("blood","liver","spleen")),
    SiteEuth = factor(SiteEuth, levels = c("CG01","CG02","CG03","CG04","CG05"))
  )

# This portion is used to generate Figure 3 in manuscript
newdat <- expand.grid(
  Tissue   = levels(df_tissue_centered$Tissue),
  SiteEuth = levels(df_tissue_centered$SiteEuth),
  EP       = "high",
  Stage    = "Female",
  BodyMassz = 0
)

pred <- fitted(
  fit_dnam_term,
  newdata = newdat,
  re_formula = NA,
  scale = "response",
  summary = TRUE
) %>% as.data.frame()

plot_df <- bind_cols(newdat, pred) %>%
  rename(p = Estimate, lo = Q2.5, hi = Q97.5)

plot_df$SiteEuth <- factor(
  plot_df$SiteEuth,
  levels = c("CG01","CG02","CG03","CG04","CG05"),
  labels = c("CpG 1","CpG 2","CpG 3","CpG 4","CpG 5")
)
```

```{r}
#Generation of Figure 3 in manuscript
ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = SiteEuth, y = p, shape = SiteEuth)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi),
                width = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tissue, nrow = 1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "CpG 1" = 16,  # filled circle
      "CpG 2" = 17,  # filled triangle
      "CpG 3" = 15,  # filled square
      "CpG 4" = 3,   # plus
      "CpG 5" = 7    # square-cross-like
    )
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "TimesNewRoman") +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 10)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "TimesNewRoman", size = 11),
    strip.text = element_text(family = "TimesNewRoman", size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "CpG site",
    y = "DNA methylation probability (p̂)"
  )
```

```{r}
emm <- emmeans(
  fit_dnam_term,
  ~ Tissue | SiteEuth,
  re_formula = NA   # population-level effects
)

emm
#Displays estimated log-odds of DNAm in that CpG site in that tissue, averaged over covariates, as emmean

#Posterior probabilities from emmeans
pairs(emm, infer = c(TRUE, TRUE))

```

```{r}
#Probabilities contrasts instead of log-odds
emmeans(
  fit_dnam_term,
  ~ Tissue | SiteEuth,
  type = "response",
  re_formula = NA
)
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
